_comment: Path A — real Gmail via a hosted MCP server + OAuth. Deferred: the URL and tool names below are placeholders from the m1.6 lab and are NOT verified. Map the real server's tool names onto the assistant's contract (list_messages / read_message / create_draft) once confirmed. Select with GMAIL_BACKEND=real. If this server is unreachable or unauthenticated, the agent still starts without Gmail tools.
